overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The journey transitions from an elevated walkway under a highway overpass, through a graffiti-covered underpass, up a distinctive yellow staircase, and into a large urban plaza featuring a police hover car with holographic caution tape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with neon city backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated sidewalk beneath the highway overpass, following the flow of pedestrian traffic

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support beams
green metal guardrail separating walkway from lower level
tall buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and digital screens
tall glass and steel towers with illuminated windows
tall modern street lights illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated concrete walkway beneath a massive highway overpass. Neon-lit buildings line the right side while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. The camera follows the pedestrian flow along the sidewalk, with sparse vehicle traffic visible on the road to the left.

events.description: turns right into darker underpass area with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass with graffiti-covered walls on the right

entered.detail: dark concrete wall of the underpass structure
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a narrow, dimly lit underpass. The bright neon cityscape gives way to dark concrete walls covered in graffiti. The space feels enclosed and sheltered, with the highway structure still overhead but the openness of the previous walkway now gone.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic plaza entrance with distinctive yellow geometric staircase

events.description: emerges from dark underpass into brighter area with yellow structural elements

agents.ego_description: walking up the ramp and stairs into the plaza, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: futuristic bright yellow angular staircase structure with integrated lighting
orange and white striped barriers with warning lights
modern building with illuminated glass facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene brightens to reveal a futuristic plaza entrance dominated by a striking yellow geometric staircase. The character ascends the ramp toward the plaza level, passing construction barriers and modern glass buildings while the highway structure remains overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban plaza with holographic police cordon and central monument

events.description: enters main plaza with police hover car and holographic caution tape
approaches overlook and views lower plaza level with central column structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past the police cordon and toward the central overlook area

notable_agents.action: police hover car parked with red and blue lights, projecting pink holographic caution tape

entered.detail: white futuristic police vehicle with glowing blue thrusters and emergency lights
pink glowing holographic barrier tape projected across the walkway
massive central structural column with bright linear lights extending outward
red plastic chairs and tables arranged in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast open plaza dominated by a police hover car projecting holographic caution tape. The space features a massive central column with radiating light beams and scattered outdoor seating. The camera moves past the police cordon and approaches an overlook revealing a lower plaza level, surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated urban walkway through a claustrophobic underpass and into a vast, neon-lit city plaza. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive highway overpass, moving past futuristic skyscrapers and sparse traffic under a glow of neon lights. As the camera turns right, the open cityscape vanishes, shifting into a dimly lit, enclosed underpass defined by dark concrete walls and vibrant graffiti. The scene then brightens as the camera emerges from the tunnel and ascends a striking yellow geometric staircase, passing construction barriers and glass buildings. Finally, the view expands into a wide plaza dominated by a police hover car with holographic caution tape, moving past a central light column toward an overlook of a lower level surrounded by towering neon advertisements.
